channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cavaliers hold off Heat 112-107 to extend winning streak to 12 and clinch playoff spot
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 26 points, Darius Garland had 10 assists and the Cleveland Cavaliers survived some sloppiness in the final two minutes to win their 12th straight game, 112-107 over the banged-up Miami Heat on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CMU Swimming is ready to chase their first National Championship
item.description: If there was ever a year for Colorado Mesa Swimming and Diving to bring home the program's first-ever national championship, this is the year.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Condon helps No. 5 Florida top No. 7 Alabama 99-94 in key SEC matchup
item.description: TUSCALOOSA, Ala. (AP) — Alex Condon had 27 points and10 rebounds to lead No. 5 Florida to a 99-94 win over No. 7 Alabama on Wednesday night. The Gators (26-4, 13-4 Southeastern Conference) also got 22 points and eight assists from Walter Clayton Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sharks trade 2028 draft pick to Penguins for veteran defenseman
item.description: San Jose Sharks acquire Vincent Desharnais from Pittsburgh Penguins for a 2028 fifth-round draft pick
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Mavericks' Kidd blasts speculation that a heavy workload contributed to Irving's knee injury
item.description: Dallas Mavericks coach Jason Kidd took issue with media speculation that Kyrie Irving’s heavy workload over the last month led to the nine-time All-Star’s season-ending knee injury.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Phillies manager has awkward in-game interview as pitcher allows 3 home runs on consecutive pitches
item.description: Philadelphia Phillies manager Rob Thomson was left silent during an in-game interview while watching his pitcher, Jesús Luzardo, give up three home runs on three pitches.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: St. Thomas is rising with rare D3-D1 jump. NCAA postseason ban makes Summit tourney the present peak
item.description: The accelerated transition to full-fledged NCAA Division I member for the University of St. Thomas is almost over.
item.dc:creator: Dave Campbell, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Cowboys restructure Prescott and Lamb deals, but any impact on free agency is murky
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — The Dallas Cowboys created nearly $57 million in salary cap space by restructuring the contracts of star quarterback Dak Prescott and his top receiver, CeeDee Lamb.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Devils star Jack Hughes out for season following hard crash into boards
item.description: New Jersey Devils star Jack Hughes underwent shoulder surgery on Wednesday following an ugly hit and is now out for the remainder of the season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Liverpool stuns PSG with late winner in Champions League and 10-man Barcelona beats Benfica
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Harvey Elliott scored less than a minute after coming on as a late substitute to fire Liverpool to a stunning 1-0 win at Paris Saint-Germain in the first leg of the Champions League round of 16 on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jai Lucas, Miami finalize agreement to make him Hurricanes' coach, AP source says
item.description: Jai Lucas and Miami have finalized the contract that makes him the school's new men's basketball coach, nearly two weeks after they struck preliminary agreement on a deal, a person with knowledge of the talks said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Emma Raducanu says she struggled to breathe after seeing 'fixated' man in the crowd
item.description: INDIAN WELLS, Calif. (AP) — Emma Raducanu says she “couldn't see the ball through tears” and struggled to breathe after spotting a man who was “fixated” on her during a match. The British tennis player and 2021 U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Auburn falls 83-72 to No. 22 Texas A&M behind Zhuric Phelps' 19 points
item.description: COLLEGE STATION, Texas (AP) — Zhuric Phelps scored 19 points off the bench and No. 22 Texas A&M never trailed in an 83-72 win over top-ranked Auburn on Tuesday night. It’s Texas A&M’s first-ever win over a team ranked No.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cowboys and defensive tackle Osa Odighizuwa agree on $80M, 4-year contract, agent says
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys and defensive tackle Osa Odighizuwa agreed Tuesday on an $80 million, four-year contract with $58 million guaranteed, his agent said. The agreement came a few hours before the deadline for clubs to apply the franchise tag on one player.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WNBA champion invests in Bay Area sports franchise
item.description: (KRON) – WNBA champion and Bay Area native Sabrina Ionescu was announced as an investor and commercial advisor for the Bay Football Club. Ionescu, who is also a three-time All-Star and Olympic gold medalist, announced her involvement with Bay FC on Instagram.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Filipowski scores 25, but Jazz lose to Detroit, 134-106
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cade Cunningham had 29 points, nine assists and four steals, and the Detroit Pistons beat the Utah Jazz 134-106 on Monday night for their 10th win in 11 games. The Jazz committed 27 turnovers end a season-long nine-gam homestand with a record of 3-6.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Foul! Cavaliers guard Ty Jerome blasts officials after whistle-happy crew calls 53 fouls
item.description: Upset with an inordinate number of personals called during Cleveland's 133-129 overtime win against Portland on Sunday, Jerome didn't hold back in criticizing the officiating crew — zeroing in on referee Natalie Sago.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Pitt football player, HSE grad dies in Fishers crash
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS — An 18-year-old football player died in a crash in Fishers late Saturday night. According to a press release sent by the Hamilton County Sheriff's Office Sunday morning, the crash happened around 9:03 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, NewsNation

item.title: Donato scores twice, Blackhawks snap 5-game skid with 6-3 road win over Ducks
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Ryan Donato had two goals and an assist, and the Blackhawks ended a five-game losing streak with a 6-3 road victory over the Anaheim Ducks on Saturday night. Teuvo Teravainen had a goal and two assists and Lukas Reichel, Wyatt Kaiser and Patrick Marron also scored.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, WGN 9
